hero.name: Mario Isaias Hernández Jiménez
hero.role: Full Stack Developer | Cybersecurity & AWS Specialist
hero.description: A dual-degree Engineer in Systems and Industrial Engineering , specializing in the design of scalable architectures and the optimization of mission-critical processes. My competitive advantage lies in the ability to translate stakeholders' strategic objectives into high-impact functional systems , successfully digitalizing and automating workflows that maximize operational profitability. I possess a proven track record of optimizing production lines and delivering results-oriented full-stack software development.

start.title: Early Foundations
start.text: My journey into technology commenced at age 14, fueled by an insatiable curiosity regarding the inner workings of mobile and web applications. My first significant milestone involved developing a proprietary social network, featuring a functional Firebase-based authentication system, real-time chat, and interaction walls. Although this project exposed me to the early realities of scalability and infrastructure overhead, it successfully laid the groundwork for my career in software architecture.

evolution.title: Advancement into Mobile & OOP
evolution.text: By age 15, I transitioned into mobile game development utilizing Swift. I engineered an advanced version of 'Tic-Tac-Toe' that incorporated online multiplayer capabilities and complex nested-game mechanics. This project served as a rigorous laboratory for mastering Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and managing intricate logical states, allowing me to validate prototypes with real-world users within my academic environment.

industrial.title: Industrial Engineering & Strategic Optimization
industrial.text: Building upon a solid self-taught foundation, I made a strategic decision at age 17 to pursue Industrial Engineering. My objective was clear: to augment my programming expertise with time studies, process optimization, and methodologies such as Lean Six Sigma and Agile. Throughout this tenure, I developed technical tools like an irrigation resource calculation system, integrating climatic and geographic variables into a streamlined technical solution.

consolidation.title: Systems Integration & Security
consolidation.text: To formalize my technical expertise, I embarked on a second degree in Computer Systems Engineering at age 19. This dual interdisciplinary background enables me to go beyond writing code—I design ergonomic and high-efficiency systems from the ground up. I am currently leveraging this foundation to specialize in Cybersecurity and Cloud infrastructure. By deepening my proficiency in Docker, Kubernetes, Linux server administration, and AWS services, I strive to ensure every deployment is as secure as it is scalable, while mastering modern methodologies such as SCRUM, BEM, and UI/UX design.

cam.description: Spearheading the development of mission-critical technological solutions for public administration and municipal revenue systems.
achievements: Engineered asynchronous billing systems with offline persistence, yielding a 24% increase in operational continuity.
Optimized intricate SQL queries and database architectures, significantly enhancing application response times.
Designed user-centric UI/UX interfaces in React and Figma, resulting in a 31.7% reduction in reporting turnaround time.
Implemented RBAC security protocols and secure RESTful APIs to safeguard sensitive citizen data.

projects.title: AI-Powered Citizen Assistance Chatbot
projects.desc: Implemented an intelligent agent leveraging Natural Language Processing to resolve inquiries. Utilized microservices architecture and RESTful APIs to facilitate automated online property tax consultations and payments.

projects.title: Travel Expense Management System (RBAC)
projects.desc: Designed and developed a robust platform for expense tracking, utilizing a Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) model to ensure security and hierarchical integrity in financial authorizations.

projects.title: Integrated Student Identity Management System
projects.desc: Architected a registration system for local students to obtain physical credentials for facility access and discounts. Included an administrative dashboard for data validation and automated credential generation.

exertus.description: Applied Industrial Engineering methodologies in synergy with data analytics to streamline production workflows.
achievements: Developed predictive models in Python for bottleneck detection, enhancing production line performance by 4.2%.
Architected big data cleaning pipelines, ensuring 95.9% data integrity for strategic executive reporting.
Generated strategic insights through the daily analysis of time and motion studies[cite: 34].

projects.title: Stochastic Process Simulation
projects.desc: Utilized R Studio for data processing and created simulation models in ProModel to predict critical production scenarios and optimize material flow.

caritas.description: Optimized supply chain and last-mile operations for the efficient distribution of perishable goods.
achievements: Restructured delivery routes geographically, achieving significant reductions in lead times and operational costs.
Modeled distribution routes based on consumption algorithms, distance, and product shelf-life to minimize waste of sensitive goods.
Digitized the distribution network's cartography for real-time monitoring of drivers and logistics.

projects.title: Digital Distribution Mapping
projects.desc: Created an interactive map with optimized routes that served as the primary framework for daily fleet logistics planning.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.description: I am open to new professional opportunities and technical collaborations. Feel free to message me before calling.
